_metadata.source: Texvin spinning markup baseline (April 2026 research) + Phase B fair evidence calibration
_metadata.unit: USD/kg added on top of upstream commodity benchmark price
notes: Markups are family-specific; subfamily/spinning system/ply adjustments are multipliers.
Final yarn price = upstream_benchmark_price + family_base_markup * adjustments.
Re-calibrate quarterly against Tier 1 Turkish quote evidence (sheet).
When evidence diverges >25% from this model, flag for manual review — markup buckets may need refinement.
Modal proxy: rayon_yarn benchmark + 0.20 USD/kg (modal_premium) BEFORE markup.
Recycled: virgin commodity benchmark + recycled_premium (0.30-0.50 USD/kg) BEFORE markup.

fiber_premium_over_benchmark._doc: Premium added to upstream benchmark BEFORE spinning markup. Used for proxy mappings.

family_base_markup._doc: Base spinning markup per fiber family (USD/kg). Applied as f(spinning_system, ply, count).

modal_staple._note: Slight premium over viscose markup due to processing complexity

polyester_staple._note: Polyester staple yarn (post-spinning); distinct from FDY/POY/DTY filament

polyamide_staple._note: Small market, limited evidence. Confidence: low.

polyester_filament_FDY._doc: FDY = Fully Drawn Yarn, post-extrusion finished filament

polyester_filament_GIPE._doc: GIPE / Air Covered Yarn = DTY wrapped around lycra core

pv_blend_staple._note: Weighted PES/VIS markup; weighted-avg upstream computed in code

three_component_staple._note: Premium over 2-component due to processing complexity

corespun_staple._note: Includes ~0.40 elastane integration premium over base ring spun

spec_adjustments._doc: Multiplicative adjustments to family_base_markup. Applied in this order: ply -> compact -> combed -> color -> recycled. Compounded.

color_state._note: Dope-dyed and colored: +10-20% per source (chips dyed at extrusion or yarn-stage dyed)

specialty._note: Specialty constructions adjustment vs vanilla family base

count_band_modifier._doc: Count-based markup modifier. Finer counts (higher Ne) cost more per kg due to more spinning passes.
count_band_modifier.denier_bands_doc: For filament: denier_class column already maps to bands; markup applied via family bucket (FDY/DTY/POY/GIPE)
